ddls:
CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* Regatta ID for the race */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the boat in the race */,
  "fleet" TEXT /* Fleet color assigned to the race */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the boat participating in the race */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "helm_id" INTEGER /* Helm ID */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Crew ID */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the boat won the race */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm (person steering the boat) */,
  "uspn" REAL /* United States Sailing Portsmouth Number (handicap) */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time for the boat to complete the race */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time for the boat, taking into account the handicap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_sail_no FOREIGN KEY ("sail_no") REFERENCES boats ("sail_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_helm_id FOREIGN KEY ("helm_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the boat */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Owner ID for the boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the boat */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture for the boat */,
  "boat_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the boat */,
  "uspn" REAL /* United States Sailing Portsmouth Number (handicap) */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Historical data including previous race results and statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES boat_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "sailor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailor */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Level of experience of the sailor (novice, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the sailor based on their performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew */,
  "sailor1_id" INTEGER /* Sailor 1 ID in the crew */,
  "sailor2_id" INTEGER /* Sailor 2 ID in the crew (if any) */,
  "sailor3_id" INTEGER /* Sailor 3 ID in the crew (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regattas" (
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regatta */,
  "regatta_name" TEXT /* Name of the regatta */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regatta */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regatta */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the regatta */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "helm_crew" (
  "helm_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helm-crew combination */,
  "helm_id" INTEGER /* Helm ID */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Crew ID */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Race ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("helm_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helm_crew_helm_id FOREIGN KEY ("helm_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helm_crew_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crews ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_helm_crew_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES race_results ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boat_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the boat owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the boat owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Sailor ID */,
  "sailing_club_id" INTEGER /* Sailing club ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memberships_sailing_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailing_club_id") REFERENCES sailing_clubs ("sailing_club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailing_clubs" (
  "sailing_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing club */,
  "sailing_club_name" TEXT /* Name of the sailing club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sailing club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailing_club_id")
)
column_names: Ranking position of the boat in the race
Fleet color assigned to the race
Class of the boat participating in the race
Boolean indicating if the boat won the race
Name of the helm (person steering the boat)
Elapsed time for the boat to complete the race
Corrected time for the boat, taking into account the handicap
Year of manufacture for the boat
Historical data including previous race results and statistics
Level of experience of the sailor (novice, intermediate, advanced)
Rating of the sailor based on their performance
Sailor 2 ID in the crew (if any)
Sailor 3 ID in the crew (if any)
Unique identifier for each helm-crew combination
Unique identifier for each boat owner
Phone number of the boat owner
Unique identifier for each sailing club
